data.current_description: Adds a user to the specified organization or updates their role.
data.description_suggestion: Adds a user to the specified organization with a specified role, or updates an existing member's role. Requires authentication and appropriate organization permissions. data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what inputs are required (user identifier, role), what the response contains, and the behavior when updating an existing member. Added details about authentication requirements, return value, and idempotent behavior for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getDistTags' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is too generic. Description lacks context about what dist-tags are and what the response structure contains. Added explanation of dist-tag purpose and clarified that response is a map with 'latest' always present, helping AI agents understand the operation's value and response format.

data.current_description: Returns all distribution tags for the specified package.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all distribution tags for package
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all distribution tags (dist-tags) for the specified package. Returns a map of tag names to version strings, always including a 'latest' tag. Dist-tags are human-readable aliases for specific package versions, allowing users to reference versions by name (e.g., 'latest', 'beta', 'stable').
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks context about what dist-tags are and what the response structure contains. Added explanation of dist-tag purpose and clarified that response is a map with 'latest' always present, helping AI agents understand the operation's value and response format.

message: Operation 'setDistTag' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks details about authentication requirements, request format (how version is specified), response content, and behavior when updating existing tags. Added information about permissions, request structure, return value, and special handling of 'latest' tag for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Sets a distribution tag to point to a specific version of the package.
data.description_suggestion: Sets a distribution tag to point to a specific package version. Requires authentication and package ownership/permissions. The request body must specify the target version. Returns the updated dist-tag mapping. If the tag already exists, it will be reassigned to the new version. The 'latest' tag can be updated but has special significance in the npm ecosystem.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about authentication requirements, request format (how version is specified), response content, and behavior when updating existing tags. Added information about permissions, request structure, return value, and special handling of 'latest' tag for AI agent clarity.

message: Operation 'removeDistTag' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description mentions the 'latest' tag constraint but lacks details about authentication, response format, and effects of removal. Added information about permissions, error handling for 'latest' tag, return value, and the consequence of removal for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Removes a distribution tag from the package. The 'latest' tag cannot be removed.
data.description_suggestion: Removes a distribution tag from the package. Requires authentication and package ownership/permissions. The 'latest' tag cannot be removed and will return an error if attempted. Returns confirmation of the removal. After removal, the tag will no longer be available for referencing package versions.
data.reasoning: Description mentions the 'latest' tag constraint but lacks details about authentication, response format, and effects of removal. Added information about permissions, error handling for 'latest' tag, return value, and the consequence of removal for AI agent understanding.
